_comment: Layered-emblem config for the MTF-style nu22 badge. Palette centroids are RGB, measured from the source with k-means. 'background' names the centroid to treat as empty (not emitted). Each layer: [fill #RRGGBB, z_order (0 = back), simplify_tol_px, mode]. mode 'silhouette' fills the whole emblem union solid (cheap backing); mode 'region' traces that colour's own area with holes preserved. Stacking white as a solid backing behind blue+green makes the white figures/stars/ring free geometry (they show through green's holes) and stops any seam revealing the background.
